'''tasatha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:zaffar|zaffar]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-s-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zaffar|zaffar]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| tasatha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:tæsæthæth|tæsæthæth]] || [[word:tæsæthæj|tæsæthæj]] || [[word:tæsæthæsh|tæsæthæsh]] || [[word:tæsæthæ|tæsæthæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:tasasathath|tasasathath]] || [[word:tasasathaj|tasasathaj]] || [[word:tasasathash|tasasathash]] || [[word:tasasatha|tasasatha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:tasathath|tasathath]] || [[word:tasathaj|tasathaj]] || [[word:tasathash|tasathash]] || [[word:tasatha|tasatha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:tasafthath|tasafthath]] || [[word:tasafthaj|tasafthaj]] || [[word:tasafthash|tasafthash]] || [[word:tasafthaf|tasafthaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:tasathatha|tasathatha]] || [[word:tasathaja|tasathaja]] || [[word:tasathasha|tasathasha]] || [[word:tasathaka|tasathaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:tasathath|tasathath]] || [[word:tasathaj|tasathaj]] || [[word:tasathash|tasathash]] || [[word:tasatha|tasatha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:tasathathal|tasathathal]] || [[word:tasathajal|tasathajal]] || [[word:tasathashal|tasathashal]] || [[word:tasathakal|tasathakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:tasathathatha|tasathathatha]] || [[word:tasathajaja|tasathajaja]] || [[word:tasathashasha|tasathashasha]] || [[word:tasathaka|tasathaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:tasathathan|tasathathan]] || [[word:tasathajan|tasathajan]] || [[word:tasathashan|tasathashan]] || [[word:tasathakan|tasathakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:tasathathaoro|tasathathaoro]] || [[word:tasathajaoro|tasathajaoro]] || [[word:tasathashaoro|tasathashaoro]] || [[word:tasathakaoro|tasathakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|06f9dc6}}
